calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-26-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day, the calendar being called in Dept. 218 by Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan. Clerks: V.Mack/S Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Not reported.
Appearances:
Arnold Evje, Esq., for Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority
Juanita Befford, Defendant in pro per.
The parties met in Dept. 304B with Judge Pro Tem Andrew Westley. The case settled. The parties agree not to put the terms on the record. The matter is removed from the settlement conference calendar and Master Jury Trial Calendar of DEC-01-2003 at 9:00 am in Dept. 206.
